title: Stellar Homes - A Virtual Home Plugin
description: A perfect home gui-based plugin for medium sized servers!
body:
# Preview
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73491f1b3d1a88789896fcc1bd9ed9d0ea0dda47.png)

# Information 

Stellar Homes is a lightweight, user-friendly Minecraft plugin designed for managing multiple homes with ease. With Stellar Homes, players can open a GUI menu where they can set, teleport to, and delete homes with a simple click. The plugin supports hex color messages, action bar notifications, and customizable GUIs. Perfect for survival, RPG, or community servers, Stellar Homes helps players stay organized and enjoy a smooth home management experience.

# Commands

/stellarhomes

/home

/homes

/sethome

/delhome <number>

All these commands work as described above

# Permissions

Max Homes by Role:

stellarhomes.member – 2 homes

stellarhomes.voter – 3 homes

stellarhomes.vip – 4 homes

stellarhomes.elite – 5 homes

stellarhomes.cosmic – 6 homes

stellarhomes.boss – 7 homes

stellarhomes.owner – 7 homes

# Command Permissions:
stellarhomes.use – Allows using /stellarhomes, /home, /homes

stellarhomes.sethome – Allows using /sethome

stellarhomes.delhome – Allows using /delhome
